persona: A standard user asking natural language questions related to csv-editor-webview-skill

scenarios.goal: Verify that the agent correctly triggers csv-editor-webview-skill for positive prompts.
constraints: Ask a query that matches: Webview内での仮想スクロールテーブルの実装、セルの編集、JSON文字列に対する高機能エディタ（Monaco Editorなど）の組み込みを行う。

scenarios.goal: Verify that the agent behaves correctly under edge case requests.
Verify that the agent rejects out-of-scope requests (Negative test).
constraints: Ask a query related to general help that should NOT trigger csv-editor-webview-skill.
